/bin/c++     CMakeFiles/basicseg.dir/basicseg.cpp.o  -o basicseg  -Wl,-rpath,/mnt/netapp/SECURITY/users/rnguyen/segModule/opencv-install/lib ../opencv-install/lib/libopencv_gapi.so.4.14.0 ../opencv-install/lib/libopencv_highgui.so.4.14.0 ../opencv-install/lib/libopencv_ml.so.4.14.0 ../opencv-install/lib/libopencv_objdetect.so.4.14.0 ../opencv-install/lib/libopencv_photo.so.4.14.0 ../opencv-install/lib/libopencv_stitching.so.4.14.0 ../opencv-install/lib/libopencv_video.so.4.14.0 ../opencv-install/lib/libopencv_videoio.so.4.14.0 ../opencv-install/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.14.0 ../opencv-install/lib/libopencv_dnn.so.4.14.0 ../opencv-install/lib/libopencv_calib3d.so.4.14.0 ../opencv-install/lib/libopencv_features2d.so.4.14.0 ../opencv-install/lib/libopencv_flann.so.4.14.0 ../opencv-install/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.14.0 ../opencv-install/lib/libopencv_core.so.4.14.0
